stemHtml: The main difference between a tornado and a dust devil is that…

options.a: The typical wind speed of a dust devil is, on average bigger than that of a tornado.
options.b: The typical diameter of a dust devil is, on average larger than that of a tornado.
options.c: The vertical extent of the dust devil is smaller than that of tornadoes.
options.d: The vertical extent of the dust devil is larger that of tornadoes.
